title: Silky Savory Mexican Tomato Bowl
description: A vegan-friendly, silky tomato bowl brimming with smoky Mexican spices, finished with a splash of lime for a fresh finish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced red onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chili powder, cumin, and smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in passata and vegetable broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, reduce heat, and let cook for 12-15 minutes to meld flavors.
Whisk the sauce vigorously to break down any solids and create a silky texture.
If using, stir in cashew cream until fully incorporated, adding more broth if needed for desired thickness.
Squeeze lime juice into the bowl, taste, and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
